description: Product Description SMOKERS TOOTHPASTE 100ML Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to a toothbrush, brush teeth in circular motions for 2 minutes, focusing on all surfaces, and then rinse with water. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. See more
